narrative:
Precinct Norwalk 4-C (precinct in Huron County) has 902 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 11.3 percentage points.
